    A

    AdrenalineShot - Class in adventure_game.items
    An Adrenaline Shot that temporarily boosts the character's damage.
    AdrenalineShot() - Constructor for class adventure_game.items.AdrenalineShot
     
    adventure_game - package adventure_game
     
    adventure_game.items - package adventure_game.items
     
    attack(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Attack another character, dealing damage based on base damage and random modifier.

    C

    castSpell(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
     
    Character - Class in adventure_game
    Abstract class representing a character in the adventure game.
    Character(String, int, int, int) - Constructor for class adventure_game.Character
    Constructor for Character class.
    Consumable - Interface in adventure_game.items
    Interface Consumable allows for the creation of consumable items like Health Potions.
    consume(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.items.AdrenalineShot
    Consumes the adrenaline shot, boosting the owner's damage for the next attack.
    consume(Character) - Method in interface adventure_game.items.Consumable
    Manifest any and all effects of this consumable item.
    consume(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.items.EchoBell
    Consumes the Echo Bell, allowing the owner to reuse their last consumed item.
    consume(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.items.HealingPotion
    Consumes the healing potion, restoring health to the owner.
    createPlayer() - Method in class adventure_game.Game
    Create a player character by prompting the user for input.

    D

    decreaseTurnsInvincible() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Decrease the number of turns the character is invincible by one.
    decreaseTurnsStunned() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Decrease the number of turns the character is stunned by one.
    decreaseTurnsVulnerable() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Decrease the number of turns the character is vulnerable by one.
    defend(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Defend to reduce incoming damage and set up for next turn.

    E

    EchoBell - Class in adventure_game.items
    An Echo Bell that allows the character to reuse their last consumed item.
    EchoBell() - Constructor for class adventure_game.items.EchoBell
     
    enterCombat(NPC) - Method in class adventure_game.Game
    Enter combat between the player and an NPC opponent.

    G

    Game - Class in adventure_game
    Main class to run the adventure game.
    Game() - Constructor for class adventure_game.Game
    Constructor for Game class.
    getBaseDamage() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Get the base damage of this Character
    getHealth() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Get the current health of this Character
    getMana() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Get the current mana of this Character
    getMaxHealth() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Get the maximum health of this Character
    getMaxMana() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Get the maximum mana of this Character
    getName() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Get the name of this Character

    H

    hasItems() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Check if the character has any items in their inventory.
    HealingPotion - Class in adventure_game.items
    A healing potion that restores health to the character who consumes it.
    HealingPotion() - Constructor for class adventure_game.items.HealingPotion
     

    I

    isAlive() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Check if the character is alive (health > 0).
    isInvincible() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Check if the character is currently invincible.
    isStunned() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Check if the character is currently stunned.
    isVulnerable() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Check if the character is currently vulnerable.

    L

    lastItemUsed - Variable in class adventure_game.Character
    The name of the last consumable item used by this character.
    lastLaugh - Variable in class adventure_game.Character
    Indicates if the character has the Last Laugh condition active.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class adventure_game.Game
     
    mana - Variable in class adventure_game.Character
     
    modifyHealth(int) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Modify the character's health by a given amount.

    N

    NPC - Class in adventure_game
    Class representing a non-player character (NPC) in the adventure game.
    NPC(String, int, int, int) - Constructor for class adventure_game.NPC
    Constructor for NPC class.

    O

    obtain(Consumable) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Obtain a consumable item and add it to the character's inventory.

    P

    Player - Class in adventure_game
    Player class represents the player character in the game.
    Player(String, int, int, int) - Constructor for class adventure_game.Player
    Constructor for Player class.

    R

    rand - Static variable in class adventure_game.Game
     

    S

    setAsInvincible(int) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Set the character as invincible for a number of turns.
    setAsStunned(int) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Set the character as stunned for a number of turns.
    setAsVulnerable(int) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Set the character as vulnerable for a number of turns.
    setTempDamageBuff(double) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Set the temporary damage buff.

    T

    takeTurn(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.NPC
    NPC takes its turn by attacking the other character, unless stunned.
    takeTurn(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.Player
    Player takes their turn by choosing an action: attack, defend, or use an item.
    toString() - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Returns a string representation of the character's attributes.

    U

    useItem(Character, Character) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Use a consumable item from the character's inventory.
    useLastItem(Character) - Method in class adventure_game.Character
    Reuse the last consumed item.
